title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **-60°**
*2026*
Lead an expedition to the meteorite impact site.
![-60°](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_9c80f733.png)

2. **Greylune**
*2026*
Gather your companions and shape your story in this unique worker placement game.
![Greylune](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_56558b5d.jpg)

3. **Lost Ruins of Arnak: Surprise Shipment**
*2026*
Venture deeper into the jungle, where the ancient canopy guards its oldest mysteries.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak: Surprise Shipment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_951ca3a3.png)

4. **An Infamous Traffic**
*2016*
Create supply chains to conduct the opium trade in 19th century Qing China.
![An Infamous Traffic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_0165bbdc.jpg)

5. **Hacienda**
*2026*
Shape the wilds of Patagonia by reintroducing native wildlife.
![Hacienda](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_e74a0f79.png)

6. **Rosalie**
*2027*
Deploy caretaker robots and crossbreed rare roses while managing debt.
![Rosalie](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_f4c657b0.jpg)

7. **Kingdom Crossing**
*2025*
Help the Queen build a new bridge for the Kingdom in this Euro-style game.
![Kingdom Crossing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_cf0219aa.jpg)

8. **Old Ones Origins**
*2028*
Become one of the eldritch gods and wage war at the dawn of time.
![Old Ones Origins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_61156b5b.png)

9. **The Game Makers**
*2026*
Follow your dreams and manufacture the greatest board games of all time.
![The Game Makers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_19924add.jpg)

10. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_ad864409.png)

11. **Entropy**
*2026*
Create stars, form planets, and guide life from microbes to animals.
![Entropy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_455cf387.jpg)

12. **Tigris & Euphrates**
*1997*
Keep your Mesopotamian civilization in perfect balance through revolutions and wars.
![Tigris & Euphrates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_5e219437.png)

13. **The White Castle: Boeki**
*2026*
Gain influence and privileges by advancing the Passage of Time track in Himeji.
![The White Castle: Boeki](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_f74dac3f.png)

14. **Forbidden Stars**
*2015*
Assemble your armies, devise your strategy, and wage war across the Herakon Cluster.
![Forbidden Stars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_087e5107.jpg)

15. **Timespan**
*2026*
Lead your civilization from the stone age to the space age in 90 minutes.
![Timespan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_80c843b7.jpg)

16. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_47314091.jpg)

17. **Sweet Lands**
*2025*
Build the richest candy empire to claim the crown of confections.
![Sweet Lands](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_d734f61f.jpg)

18. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*2020*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_5f931659.jpg)

19. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_0b13b206.jpg)

20. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_946093ca.png)

21. **Drillers**
*2026*
Mine for minerals, upgrade your deck and manage your resources carefully.
![Drillers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_202b4895.jpg)

22. **Queen Alice**
*2026*
A mid-heavy eurogame all about tea, chess and building engines.
![Queen Alice](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_ede78353.jpg)

23. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_14c7e415.png)

24. **Avalon: The Riven Veil**
*2026*
An Arthurian area control game where factions explore the misty isle of Avalon.
![Avalon: The Riven Veil](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_610a866c.jpg)

25. **An Infamous Traffic: Second Edition**
*None*
Create supply chains to conduct the opium trade in 19th century Qing China.
![An Infamous Traffic: Second Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_1144201d.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_b2d30b2d.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_03bc2725.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_85cdd83d.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_e1b33dd9.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_584d3387.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_06b27f1b.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_d13311b2.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_be0a6962.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*36 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_26e6ba5d.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_b2f2ab71.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_962fee8a.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_fac5c07e.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_21a2b4c2.jpg)

14. **dnup**
*1 months on the list*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_72a63e4e.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*33 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_cb467ec1.jpg)

16. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_9e17869a.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*5 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_39b1f0bf.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*12 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_c853015e.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*5 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_74b64578.png)

20. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*66 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_ab6d3156.jpg)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*19 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_4ec8a7db.jpg)

22. **Wondrous Creatures**
*1 months on the list*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_955062f2.jpg)

23. **Carcassonne**
*276 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_fbe3be0a.jpg)

24. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*12 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_85586384.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*43 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-24/toplist/bgg_ab543b20.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com
